description_long: This is a single-story modern bungalow surrounded by a dense perimeter of mature trees, creating a private and enclosed yard. The building features a flat roof with a small skylight or roof window visible at the center. The front yard includes a driveway leading to a garage, and a small landscaped area with shrubs and a tree near the entrance. The rear of the bungalow opens to a patio or garden space, partially visible through the trees. The exterior walls are light-colored, likely finished in stucco or painted concrete, and the windows are arranged in a linear, modern pattern. The overall layout is rectangular, with the house centrally positioned within the tree-lined lot.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with a flat roof, surrounded by dense trees and featuring a driveway, garage, and landscaped yard.
description_view_0: Aerial view of the front, showing the driveway, garage, and main entrance framed by trees.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the elongated rectangular shape, flat roof, and dense tree border.
description_view_2: Rear view revealing the backyard patio area and more of the private garden space.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the garage extension and continuous tree enclosure.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with linear side and rear windows
